chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated Companies that provide proactive, leading-indicator credit risk signals on businesses — flagging elevated risk of non-payment, bad debt, or financial distress either at customer onboarding or through ongoing portfolio monitoring. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US). Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
